321:     closeEditor(): void {
322:       // Clean up scroll handler
323:       if (scrollCleanup) {
324:         scrollCleanup();
325:         scrollCleanup = null;
326:       }
327:       
328:       if (this.collab) {
329:         // Disconnect first (closes WebSocket, removes event listeners)
330:         // This must happen before destroying the view to avoid dispatch errors
331:         this.collab.disconnect();
332:         // Then destroy the editor view
333:         if (this.collab.editor) {
334:           this.collab.editor.view.destroy();
335:         }
336:         this.collab = null;
337:       }
338:       updateStatus('disconnected');
339:     },
